title: Screams and another few questions
wikitext: []: [Spoilers] Screams and another few questions.             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Jun 02, 2010 8:26 am When Eva-01 bites Bardiel in half, listen close, and you'll hear high-pitching groaning, followed by a scream. My question is, what screamed? Was it Asuka? Bardiel? Yui? The same effect is used when the Dummy System-Plug was ejected from Eva-01, but with a different scream. Second, how did Zerogouki get its legs injured? Third, what was that purple glowing stuff that Eva-03 and Eva-02 were being lowered into?

chunks.content:
Article: Screams and another few questions
[]: [Spoilers] Screams and another few questions.             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Jun 02, 2010 8:26 am When Eva-01 bites Bardiel in half, listen close, and you'll hear high-pitching groaning, followed by a scream. My question is, what screamed? Was it Asuka? Bardiel? Yui? The same effect is used when the Dummy System-Plug was ejected from Eva-01, but with a different scream. Second, how did Zerogouki get its legs injured? Third, what was that purple glowing stuff that Eva-03 and Eva-02 were being lowered into?
